front.title: Evolutionary computation
front.subtitle: Trial and error problem solvers with a metaheuristic or stochastic optimization character

back.text: Evolutionary computation (EC) from computer science is a family of algorithms for global optimization inspired by biological evolution, and a subfield of computational intelligence and soft computing studying these algorithms. In technical terms, they are a family of population-based trial and error problem solvers with a metaheuristic or stochastic optimization character.
